name: GOER Number 30 Balloons for 30th Birthday Party Decorations,42 Inch Jumbo Foil Helium Balloons for 30th Anniversary (Black)
bullets: Premium Reinforced Composite Material:Crafted from a heavy-duty PA / AL / PE triple-layer composite, our balloons feature a thickened design that far surpasses standard PET or cheap plastic alternatives. This advanced structure ensures superior durability and a high-end finish for your decorations.

Superior Burst Resistance & Puncture Proof​:Engineered for high tensile strength and exceptional puncture resistance, these balloons withstand higher inflation pressures without popping. The robust PA layer provides outstanding anti-burst protection, making them ideal for large-scale events and intricate balloon arches.

Enhanced Airtightness & Long-Lasting Float Time​:The aluminum (AL) barrier layer combined with a precision heat-sealed PE inner layer guarantees excellent airtightness. Enjoy decorations that stay fully inflated for longer periods without leaking, keeping your setup looking fresh throughout the entire event.

Reusable & Crease-Resistant Design​:Say goodbye to permanent creases. Our unique material allows for multiple deflations, folds, and re-inflations. The edges and seams resist whitening or weakening, maintaining their original shape and elasticity for repeated use, saving you money.

Extreme Temperature & Cold Flexibility (-20°C to -30°C)​:Unlike ordinary balloons that turn brittle in the cold, our PA composite material remains soft, flexible, and resilient​ even in extreme temperatures as low as -20°C to -416°C. Perfect for outdoor winter parties, weddings, or refrigerated displays without cracking.
description: Why Choose Our Reinforced PA/AL/PE Balloons?Built to Last with Triple-Layer Protection​Stop worrying about popping! Our balloons are made from a thickened PA / AL / PE composite material, which is significantly stronger than standard PET or thin plastic. The PA outer layer provides unmatched tensile strength, while the AL mid-layer ensures perfect airtightness.Extreme Cold Resistance (-20°C to -30°C)​Most balloons turn brittle and crack in the cold. reviews.name: Jeanie
reviews.title: Fun and vibrant
reviews.body: These balloons were a great addition to the party! The balloons were a good size and made a nice statement without being overwhelming. The colors were vibrant and looked exactly as pictured, adding a festive touch to the decorations.

reviews.name: I Review Things
reviews.title: Perfect Balloons for My Daughter's 17th Birthday Bash!
reviews.body: As we planned my daughter's 17th birthday celebration, we wanted every detail to be just right. She adores the color light blue and envisioned our home adorned with her favorite hue. Moreover, she specifically requested large number 17 balloons to make a statement at her party. However, we were mindful that traditional helium balloons wouldn't last long enough to capture the magic of her special day.

reviews.name: Bia Lymberis
reviews.title: Definitely buy these!!!
reviews.body: Awesome balloons! They come with a straw so you can easily blow them up and I was easily able to blow them both up myself in under 3 minutes! They stayed perfectly throughout the event and are still almost fully inflated in my car a week later! They’re so fun and bright colored and make for such a cute decoration. Would definitely buy again!

reviews.name: milsport
reviews.title: Great buy on number balloons
reviews.body: Perfect number balloons, size and color was what I was looking for. Filled easily and are still full today after 2 weeks! I will definitely purchase again.
